description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with elongated and distorted limbs and body, giving it an abstract and surreal appearance. The figure appears to be in a dynamic pose, with one leg extended and the other bent, as if in mid-stride or possibly running. The arms are also stretched and bent at unusual angles, contributing to the overall sense of motion and distortion. The clothing is form-fitting and appears to be athletic wear, with visible shoes that have a distinct, realistic shape compared to the rest of the body. The head and facial features are not clearly defined, and the proportions are exaggerated, making the figure appear almost sculptural. The surface is smooth and reflective, with a mix of matte and glossy finishes, suggesting synthetic materials.
description: An abstract, elongated adult pedestrian in athletic wear, with distorted limbs and a dynamic, mid-stride pose. The figure has smooth, reflective surfaces and realistic shoes.
description_view_0: The figure's torso and upper limbs are most visible, with the arms and legs appearing stretched and bent at sharp angles.
description_view_1: This view highlights the extended leg and the side profile of the body, showing the dynamic stride and the detailed shoe.
description_view_2: The back of the figure is visible, emphasizing the exaggerated width of the torso and the unusual limb positions.
description_view_3: A side angle showing both legs, one extended and one bent, with a clear view of the shoe and the abstract, angular form of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with fitted top and pants
attribute_posture: mid-stride with limbs extended and bent
